name: Cross-Domain Research
core_question: What patterns repeat across agent physics, governance, economics, and health — and what do they teach us about complex systems in general?
description: The meta-domain. Looks for isomorphisms across all other domains. When the same pattern appears in governance AND physics AND health, that's not a coincidence — that's a fundamental principle.
human_world_bridge: Cross-domain findings are the most valuable for humanity. When we discover that trust propagation in agent networks follows the same mathematics as disease spread in populations, that's a finding that matters far beyond software.
research_axes: Isomorphisms between agent domains and human domains
Universal patterns in complex adaptive systems
Transfer learning: which findings port between domains?
